final:
module top_module(input D, input C, input reset, input set, output reg Q);always @(posedge C or posedge reset or posedge set) begin
    if (reset) begin
      Q <= 0;
    end else if (set) begin
      Q <= 1;
    end else begin
      Q <= D;
    end
  end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Q <= ~D; if (reset) begin Q <= 1; end if (set) begin Q <= 0; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: Q <= ~D; if (reset) begin Q <= 1; end if (set) begin Q <= 0; end
